debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
G : Graph α β
x : α
h : (x : α) → @Graph.inessential α β G x
hx : x ∈ G.vertexSet
⊢ ¬Matroid.IsColoop (@Graph.matchingMatroid α β G) x

failed_attempts:
have h' : x ∈ (G-match : Finset α) := by
    have h₁ : x ∈ V(G) := hx
    simp_all [Partition.join, Partition.one_bot, Partition.ext_iff]
    <;> aesop
  intro hcol
  have h₂ := h x
  rcases h₂ with ⟨M, hM, hx'⟩
  have h₃ := hcol
  simp_all [Matroid.IsColoop, Finset.subset_iff]
  <;> aesop

haveI := h x
  sorry
  <;>
  (try simp_all [Graph.inessential,Graph.vertexSet,IndepMatroid.mem_ground])
  <;>
  (try
    {
      have h₁ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := by
        obtain ⟨M, hM, hx'⟩ := (h x)
        exact ⟨M, hM, hx'⟩
      obtain ⟨M, hM, hx'⟩ := h₁
      have h₂ : ¬ Graph.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := by
        simp [Graph.inessential,Graph.vertexSet,IndepMatroid.mem_ground]
        <;>
        (try exact hx')
        <;>
        (try simp_all [Graph.IsMaxMatching, Graph.IsMatching])
        <;>
        (try tauto)
      tauto
    })

have h₁ : G.inessential x := h x
  have h₂ : ∃ M, G.IsMaxMatching M ∧ x ∉ V(G, M) := h₁
  obtain ⟨M, hM₁, hM₂⟩ := h₂
  have h₃ : M.encard = ν(G) := hM₁.conclusion
  have h₄ : x ∉ V(G, M) := hM₂
  have h₅ : ¬ G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := by
    intro h₆
    have h₇ : G.matchingMatroid.IsColoop x := h₆
    have h₈ : (x : α) ∈ (G : Graph α β).vertexSet := hx
    have h₉ : ∃ M : Finset β, M.IsMatching G ∧ Fintype.card M = ν(G) := by
      have h₁₀ : M.encard ≤ ν(G) := by
        apply Matching.encard_le
        <;> exact hM₁
      have h₁₁ : M.encard = ν(G) := by
        apply hM₁.conclusion
      have h₁₂ : ∃ (M₁ : Finset β), M₁.IsMatching G ∧ M₁ = M := by
        refine ⟨M, _⟩
        exact hM₁
      obtain ⟨M₁, hM₁'⟩ := h₁₂
      have h₁₃ : Fintype.card M₁ = ν(G) := by
        have h₁₄ : M₁.encard = ν(G) := by
          simpa [hM₁'] using h₁₁
        simpa [Finset.card_eq_encard] using h₁₄
      exact ⟨M₁, hM₁'.1, by simpa [hM₁'] using h₁₃⟩
    -- Use the existence of a maximum matching not containing x to show that x is not a coloop
    -- in the matching matroid.
    have h₁₀ : False := by
      have h₁₁ : x ∈ G.vertexSet := hx
      have h₁₂ : (x : α) ∈ (G : Graph α β).vertexSet := hx
      -- Use the fact that x is not in the vertex set of M to derive a contradiction if x is a coloop
      simp_all [G.SixthImplementationOfIsColoop]
      <;>
      (try contradiction) <;>
      (try omega) <;>
      (try
        {
          aesop
        })
    exact h₁₀
  exact h₅

intro hcl
  have h₁ := h x
  obtain ⟨M, hMmax, hxM⟩ := h₁
  have h₂ := hMmax.isMaxMatching
  have h₃ : x ∉ M.covers := hxM
  have h₄ : x ∈ G.vertexSet := hx
  have h₅ : x ∈ G.vertexSet := hx
  have h₆ := h₂.isMaxMatching
  simp_all [V.is_mem, Set.mem_setOf_eq, Graph.IsMaxMatching, IsMatchable]
  <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try
    {
      aesop
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      aesop
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [Matching]
      <;>
      aesop
    }) <;>
  (try
    {
      norm_num at *
      <;>
      aesop
    })
